description: Versioned registry of rules sources for the rules-dependent skills (hyrox-division-and-rules-advisor, hyrox-doubles-strategy-builder, hyrox-relay-strategy-builder). Division weights, distances, standards, and seasonal rules are NEVER hardcoded into skill bodies. A skill may only apply a rule that is present here with a season/effective_date matching the athlete's event, and must warn when the matching version is stale or absent. This file ships EMPTY of proprietary rulebook content: no HYROX manuals are scraped or embedded. Entries are added only from user-supplied or properly licensed/authorized sources. See references/race-structure.md and docs/branding-and-trademarks.md.

field_definitions.source_id: Stable unique identifier for this rules source/version, e.g. 'user-2026-season-singles'.
field_definitions.organization: The body that issued the rules (e.g. the event organizer, or 'user-supplied').
field_definitions.document_title: Title of the rulebook / standards document.
field_definitions.season: Season or edition label the rules apply to (e.g. '2026', '2025/26').
field_definitions.retrieved_date: YYYY-MM-DD the content was supplied to / recorded in this repo.
field_definitions.authorization_status: One of: user_supplied | public_reference | licensed | unverified | none.
field_definitions.official_source_reference: Where the user/maintainer can verify the canonical rule (URL or citation), NOT scraped content.
field_definitions.supersedes: source_id of the prior version this replaces, or null.
field_definitions.notes: Free-text caveats, scope, and known gaps.
